sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2128" key="ai)geirofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγειροφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poplar-bearing</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:29:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
